name: GitHub
description: Exports your GitHub profile, repositories, starred repositories, public activity events, and contribution graph.

scopes.label: Your GitHub profile
scopes.description: Account profile information such as name, bio, follower counts, pinned repositories, organization memberships, and achievement badges

scopes.label: Your repositories
scopes.description: Your repository list with metadata like language, stars, and update time

scopes.label: Your starred repositories
scopes.description: Repositories you have starred on GitHub

scopes.label: Your recent activity
scopes.description: Recent public activity (pushes, pull requests, issues, comments, branches, releases) across every repository you have touched, including organization-owned repos

scopes.label: Your contribution graph
scopes.description: Daily contribution counts for the last year, monthly totals, and your top day
